quote: Value Creation Framework Targets for Fiscal Year 2026 - 2028 (non-GAAP). From 2026 through 2028, the Company expects: annual adjusted earnings per share growth between 15-20%; organic fee revenue growth between 6-8%; free cash flow conversion between 60-80%; adjusted EBITDA margin improvement of +150bps by YE 2028; and net debt leverage of 2x by YE 2028.
